title: Forever Ephraim
summary: A content-focused portfolio experience designed to showcase writing, marketing, and digital storytelling.
shortDescription: A digital experience built around content, storytelling, and personal publishing.

overview: Forever Ephraim is a content-focused portfolio experience designed to showcase writing, marketing, and digital storytelling.
The experience needed to make content presentation feel clear, personal, and easy to browse.
challenges: The project needed to support writing, marketing, and digital storytelling without making the experience feel crowded.
The content needed a structure that could stay readable and flexible.
approach: Focused on content hierarchy and clean presentation.
Built a digital publishing experience around storytelling.
Used responsive layouts to keep the work readable across screen sizes.
outcome: The result is a digital experience built around content, storytelling, and personal publishing.
caseStudy.pullQuote: Content-led websites work best when the interface gets out of the way.

seo.title: Forever Ephraim | Cornerstone Ephraim
seo.description: A digital experience built around content, storytelling, and personal publishing.
